action_set_definitions.name: get_cargo_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the weight, dimensions, and footprint of a specific cargo unit.

cargo_id.description: The unique identifier for the cargo unit.

action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_operational_limits
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the safety thresholds for stability, including minimum GM, maximum allowable list, and maximum allowable list swing during operations.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hatch_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the structural specifications of a specific hatch cover.

action_set_definitions.name: get_crane_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all available cranes and their Safe Working Load (SWL) at a specific outreach.

outreach_m.description: The horizontal distance for the lift.

action_set_definitions.name: get_stability_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current metacentric height (GM) and list of the vessel.

action_set_definitions.name: get_ballast_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the status of all ballast tanks including current weight and remaining capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_dynamic_lift
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the entire movement of a weight from pickup to stowage. Returns the 'worst-case' stability metrics encountered during the transit to ensure 'at all times' safety.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_hatch_reinforcement
action_set_definitions.description: Deploys load-spreading equipment (dunnage/mats) on a hatch cover.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_ballast_transfer
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts water levels in ballast tanks to prepare for or compensate for a lift.

delta_mt.description: Positive for filling, negative for discharging.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_heavy_lift_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the physical transfer of the cargo using the selected cranes. This tool monitors stability internally during the process.

state_description.vessel_metrics: General vessel identifiers and physical limits
state_description.stability_status: Current stability and equilibrium of the ship
state_description.ballast_tanks: Status of water ballast tanks used for stability
